description_long: An elderly person stands with arms slightly outstretched, wearing a long, dark brown overcoat layered over a blue tunic or dress. The figure has a bald head with a fringe of gray hair around the sides and back, and a prominent, wrinkled face with a gentle expression. The attire includes a high, white collar and white cuffs, adding a formal touch to the outfit. Black boots cover the lower legs, and the overall build is slender with slightly stooped shoulders. The hands are extended outward, and the figure's posture suggests a calm, composed demeanor. The clothing appears to be made of fabric, while the visible skin is pale and smooth.
description: An elderly person with a bald head and gray hair fringe, dressed in a long brown overcoat, blue tunic, and black boots, stands with arms outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view shows the elderly person's facial features, high white collar, blue tunic, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the bald head with gray hair at the back, and the layered coat.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head with gray hair, the full length of the brown overcoat, and the boots.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, coat layers, and the figure's posture.
attribute_clothing_style: Long brown overcoat with white cuffs and collar, blue tunic or dress underneath, and black boots; formal layered attire.
attribute_posture: Standing upright with arms outstretched to the sides.
attribute_hairstyle: Bald on top with short gray hair around the sides and back.
attribute_facial_features: Prominent wrinkles, no facial hair, gentle expression, and a smooth, pale complexion.
